siteSettings.title: Pet Share
siteSettings.description: A satirical pet-sharing marketplace for people who need a very temporary break.

defaultSeo.title: Pet Share
defaultSeo.description: Borrowable pets, questionable peace of mind.

seo.title: Pet Share | Borrowable Pets
seo.description: A bright, friendly, deeply unserious marketplace for temporary pet relief.

heroCarousel.headline: Has your dog thrown up in the bed recently?
heroCarousel.body: Lend him out for a couple days. Someone else deserves character development.

heroCarousel.headline: Need a weekend away from snack enforcement?
heroCarousel.body: Pet Share connects fictional owners with brave temporary admirers.

contentSections.title: Browse pets with warning labels
contentSections.description: Filter by species, mess risk, cuddle policy, and other important signs of temporary responsibility.

contentSections.headline: Real CMS flexibility. Deeply fictional pets.
contentSections.body: This demo content is structured, reusable, and intentionally ridiculous.

seo.title: Available Pets | Pet Share
seo.description: Browse temporary companions with permanent opinions.

hero.headline: Browse available chaos.
hero.body: Find a temporary roommate with strong opinions.

petIndexPage.filterIntro: Narrow the field by species, mess risk, cuddle policy, and other warning signs.

contentSections.headline: Still deciding?
contentSections.body: That is reasonable. Some of these pets come with instructions.

seo.title: Page Not Found | Pet Share
seo.description: The requested Pet Share page could not be found.

systemPageNotFound.headline: This pet has slipped its collar.
systemPageNotFound.message: The page you are looking for wandered off before we could attach the tiny bell. Try the available pets or head home.

seo.title: Server Error | Pet Share
seo.description: Pet Share hit a temporary problem.

systemPageServerError.headline: Something chewed through the server cable.
systemPageServerError.message: Pet Share hit a problem while fetching the good stuff. Try again in a moment or browse pets that are behaving for now.
systemPageServerError.supportCopy: If this keeps happening, the master inbox can receive a polite report.

seo.title: Something Went Wrong | Pet Share
seo.description: Pet Share hit a temporary problem.

systemPageGenericError.headline: The pets knocked something over.
systemPageGenericError.message: Something went wrong, but the site is still trying to look innocent. Try again or head back to the available pets.

marketingPages.title: About
marketingPages.summary: The fictional history of sharing pets with people who have not read the fine print.

seo.title: About | Pet Share
seo.description: Learn about the fake marketplace behind temporary pet relief.

hero.headline: Built for owners who need one quiet afternoon.
hero.body: Pet Share is a satirical demo marketplace with reusable content, structured relationships, and highly specific disclaimers.

sections.headline: Our deeply fictional origin
sections.body: The idea began when one overwhelmed owner asked whether anyone else wanted to borrow a dog with excellent eyebrows and questionable timing.

sections.label: Fictional towels deployed
sections.supportingText: None of them asked for this.

marketingPages.title: Process
marketingPages.summary: How temporary pet relief becomes somebody else's short-term problem.

seo.title: Process | Pet Share
seo.description: Learn how Pet Share's fictional pet borrowing process works.

hero.headline: A simple process with several disclaimers.
hero.body: Submit interest, await a highly fictional approval, and pick up the pet within seven days.

sections.title: Choose a pet
sections.description: Find the listing that best matches your tolerance for noise, fur, and eye contact.

sections.title: Read the warning label
sections.description: Every good borrowing relationship begins with informed consent and a lint roller.

marketingPages.title: Pricing
marketingPages.summary: Plans for every level of fictional pet responsibility.

seo.title: Pricing | Pet Share
seo.description: Explore fictional pricing tiers for the Pet Share demo.

hero.headline: Transparent pricing. Opaque pet motives.
hero.body: Choose the level of temporary responsibility that best matches your furniture insurance.

sections.name: Weekend Problem
sections.description: For borrowers with two free days and one washable blanket.

marketingPages.title: Warranty
marketingPages.summary: A serious-looking form for deeply unserious pet-related claims.

seo.title: Warranty | Pet Share
seo.description: Contact Pet Share or file a fictional pet warranty claim.

hero.headline: Did a pet breach the implied snack covenant?
hero.body: Tell the master inbox what happened. We will respond with the seriousness your rug deserves.

sections.headline: Please do not mail us the evidence
sections.body: Photos and clear descriptions are enough for this fictional support process.
